free_text: Neutron capture cross sections of even-mass tellurium
isotopes
Te samples of 99.99% metalic purity, typical
dimensions - thickness 0.4-0.5 mm, length and width
several mm, mass from 7 to 130 mg.
Total uncertainty. In order to reduce the
statistical uncertainties the total capture cross
sections were obtained as averaged values from at
least three different gamma lines for each isotope.
Thermal/epithermal neutron spectrum, flux density
dependent on irradiation position and varies between
neutrons/(cm**2 * s).
